channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Horror as diver searching sewer pond for body of man, 19, finds 2 more
item.description: City of Harare accused of negligence as mayor demands answers The post Horror as diver searching sewer pond for body of man, 19, finds 2 more appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: 2 Business Partners’ Shocking Deaths: Both hit by multiple cars 2 months apart, both hit on Saturdays, both died while going to collect their cars
item.description: A Chilling Coincidence: Two Business Partners, Two Tragic Saturday Deaths Harare – A profound sense of unease has settled over Harare following the eerily similar deaths of two prominent business partners, Innocent Murauro and Tendai Njiva. Both men, known for their entrepreneuri via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe repatriates 74 citizens as xenophobic violence spreads across South Africa
item.description: Returnees describe frantic escapes, looted homes and torn documents The post Zimbabwe repatriates 74 citizens as xenophobic violence spreads across South Africa appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Mutapa brokered deal revives Air Zimbabwe’s Harare-London flights
item.description: AIR Zimbabwe will resume direct flights between Harare and London on July 1, 2026, ending a 14-year absence from the United Kingdom market. The impending developments are in line with the Mutapa Investment Fund’s (MIF) broad strategy to resuscitate the national airline to its pas via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: RBZ mops up liquidity with new ZiG Bills @zimsituation @ReserveBankZIM
item.description: Source: RBZ mops up liquidity with new ZiG Bills -Newsday Zimbabwe The Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe (RBZ) has launched a new round of Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG)-denominated Term Deposit Facility Bills aimed at absorbing excess liquidity from the market, stabilising the exchange rate and str via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimbabwe home cook features on major US cooking competition
item.description: Anesu Mirisawu SENIOR ENTERTAINMENT WRITER UNITED States-based home cook and food content creator Maxine Chikumbo featured on the new American cooking com... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! S via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Legal Discussions with Vengai Madzima: Inheritance Procedures for Farm Land in Zimbabwe
item.description: NewZimbabwe.com has invited Mr. Vengai Madzima, the Senior Partner at Madzima Chidyausiku Museta Legal Practitioners (MCM Legal), to discuss with us legal issues that affect Zimbabweans. The discussions are of a general nature; those seeking specific legal advice should consult t via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: ‘It was a sacrifice’, says diver as he relives harrowing Budiriro 3 sewer of death retrieval operation
item.description: SUB-aqua diver Victor Kazembe risked his own life by descending into a sewer-filled trench in Budiriro Sunday night to recover what rescuers believed was the body of one drowning victim. Instead, he emerged later having recovered three bodies from the murky pit in a chilling oper via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Chinese Ambassador praises Zimbabwean youth at Chinese Bridge finals @bulawayo24
item.description: Chinese Ambassador to Zimbabwe Zhou Ding has commended young Zimbabweans who participated in the 2026 Chinese Bridge Competition Finals, describing the event as a celebration of diligence, excellence... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News
